model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE target_catalog.target_schema.tbl_full_refresh_example
USING DELTA
AS
WITH g9i_overwrite_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g9i_overwrite_transformed AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g9i_overwrite_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  load_dttm
FROM g9i_overwrite_transformed
